expectations.text: [checkpoint_enforcement][advisory] Case focus is explicitly covered: Google Sheets dashboard export coverage distinguishes supported formats, entry points, and output expectations
expectations.evidence: result.md explicitly breaks out the case focus into the required distinctions: "Google Sheets dashboard export coverage distinguishes: Supported formats; Entry points; Output expectations" and then provides separate sections "A) Supported formats", "B) Entry points", and "C) Output expectations".

expectations.text: [checkpoint_enforcement][advisory] Output aligns with primary phase phase5b
expectations.evidence: The produced artifact is explicitly framed and structured as Phase 5b checkpoint review: title "Phase 5b Checkpoint Enforcement Review" and includes "Phase 5b checkpoint mapping (rubric-aligned)" with checkpoints (e.g., "Checkpoint 1 — Requirements Traceability", "Checkpoint 2 — Black-Box Behavior Validation", etc.) and Phase 5b acceptance criteria for checkpoint_audit/checkpoint_delta/Phase 5b draft.
